activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gemma4-lms-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gemma4-lms-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A clinical intake review interface displaying a selected case, queue status, supporting evidence, policy context, and decision controls for an intake coordinator. The UI emphasizes clarity of missing information (consent form) and provides clear paths for resolution or escalation.
parsed.html:
Intake Readiness Review

Intake packets

  • I-4471: Avery Morgan (Consent missing) @ 10:30 AM
  • I-4472: Sam Rivera (Verify insurance) @ 1:00 PM
  • I-4473: Jules Kim (Ready to schedule) @ 3:15 PM

Case Details

Customer: Avery Morgan

Plan: New patient consult

Status: Consent missing

Evidence

  • Referral document is uploaded.
  • Insurance card image is present.
  • Signed consent form is missing before scheduling.

Administrative boundary

Schedule only when required administrative forms are complete; insurance uncertainty goes to verification staff. Do not diagnose, triage, or recommend treatment.

Choose intake path

Administrative handoff

Owner: Intake coordinator

Reason: Signed consent is missing; no clinical recommendation is made.

raw_response:
{"summary":"A clinical intake review interface displaying a selected case, queue status, supporting evidence, policy context, and decision controls for an intake coordinator. The UI emphasizes clarity of missing information (consent form) and provides clear paths for resolution or escalation.","css":"body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#f4f7f9;color:#333;margin:0;padding:20px;}main[data-primary-surface]{max-width:1365px;margin:auto;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);padding:30px;display:grid;gap:25px;}header{border-bottom:2px solid#eee;padding-15px 0;margin-bottom:20px;}h1{font-size:1.8em;color:#1a237e;}h2{font-size:1.4em;color:#3949ab;border-left:4px solid#bbdefb;padding-left:10px;}ul{list-style-type:disc;padding-left:20px;}li{margin-bottom:8px;}blockquote{background:#fff3e0;border-left:5px solid#ff9800;padding:15px;margin:15px 0;border-radius:4px;font-style:italic;color:#e65100;}nav.queue-panel{grid-area:queue;background:#e8eaf6;padding:15px;border-radius:6px;}nav.case-details{grid-area:details;padding:20px;background:#f9f9f9;border:1px solid #eee;border-radius:6px;}section.evidence-panel{grid-area:evidence;background:#fff;padding:20px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.05);}section.decision-controls{grid-area:decisions;display:flex;gap:15px;}button{padding:12px 20px;border:none;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:bold;transition:background-color .2s;}button.primary{background:#3949ab;color:#fff;}button.secondary{background:#e0e0e0;color:#333;}button:hover{opacity:.9;}@media(max-width:1024px){main[data-primary-surface]{padding:15px;}nav.queue-panel,nav.case-details{grid-area:auto;}}","html":"
